event: content_block_start
data: {"type":"content_block_start","index":0,"content_block":{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_1","name":"add_layer","input":{}}}

event: content_block_delta
data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"name\":"}}

data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"\"Letter A\",\"position\":1}"}}

event: content_block_stop
data: {"type":"content_block_stop","index":0}

event: message_stop
data: {"type":"message_stop"}
